member.name: P:GTA.Entity.MaterialCollidingWith
member.summary:
Gets the material this
is pushing up against.
member.value:
A material hash if this
has collision; otherwise,
.

remarks.para:
This returns
in some cases, although this enrity is internally considered touched with something. For example, this returns
when this
is a
and this
doesn't push none of the touching entities, including buildings. However, this returns
when this
touches any ragdolled peds.

Note that when this
is a this
and only its wheels touches something, the game will consider the entity touching nothing and this returns
.
